name: Coating for Your Thanksgiving Turkey
recipeInstructions: This coating is suitable for a 13-15 lb turkey. Other seasonings can be adjusted to taste. Traditionally, I never measured the ingredients. This coating can be applied to any poultry before roasting. To prepare, mix all ingredients together to form a thick paste with the consistency of finger paint. If using children, have them wear old clothes and assist in the process. Spread the paste evenly inside and outside the cavity. Note that this recipe does not include gravy master or oil, which are unnecessary according to my preference. The skin will cook to a nice crisp texture. Be sure to baste during cooking. Additionally, you can use this method for baking other dishes in the oven as well. During one dinner with friends who were fellow students, they couldn't guess that the turkey was cooked using this method in the oven. I hope you all have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday.
